lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello monk.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Hello adventurer. My name is Brother Kojo. Do you happen to know the time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry, I don't.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Exactly! This clock tower has recently broken down, and without it nobody can tell the correct time. I must fix it before the town people become too angry!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: I don't suppose you could assist me in the repairs? I'll pay you for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK old monk, what can I do?

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Oh, thank you kind [sir/madam]! In the cellar below, you'll find four cogs. They're too heavy for me, but you should be able to carry them one at a time.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: I know one goes on each floor... but I can't exactly remember which goes where specifically. Oh well, I'm sure you can figure it out fairly easily.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll do my best.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Thank you again! And remember to be careful, the cellar is full of strange beasts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now old monk.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: OK then. Come back and let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Brother Kojo.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Oh hello there traveller. You've done a grand job with the clock. It's just like new.

sections.title: With a chart and sextant in the inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Hello, traveller, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to learn how to be a navigator.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: I don't know if I can help you there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The professor from the Observatory says that I need a watch.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Ah, that I can help you with. I've been tinkering with this new idea of a watch and made a few. The problem is the villagers don't see the point as they have the Clock Tower!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have one?

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: You can have this one! It's the display model.

sections.title: Speaking to him again with the challenge scroll in the inventory

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: You really clocked that one!

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Brother Kojo
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
